title: Solid Color Blocks
description: A Resource pack Dedicated To Pixel Artists
body:
# **What Is SCB?**

SCB takes the average color of a vanilla block texture and flattens the entire texture to that color. This pack is intended for pixel art use.

## Some examples are below.


![The Lone Warrior - Art Piece](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b047e283d8084a40dd040d54587ca0b98a84b607_0.webp)

![Zane Oak - Art Piece](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4fbd213c6fadd70564b8a1cda74715e15d2f3695.png)
